holdings.infoBox: AMEM is an equity ETF with a total of 33 individual holdings. The top holdings are Us Dollars stock at 15.59%, Delta Electronics at 6.05%, Samsung Electronics at 5.74%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 4.81%, and Jabil at 4.50%.

overview.description: The Amana Developing World ETF (AMEM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, pursuing long-term capital growth, by investing in equities spanning across emerging markets. The ETF targets investors seeking value and diversification beyond developed markets. AMEM was launched on Jun 24, 2026 and is issued by Amana.
